title: Modern Retail Store
testimonial: Groove Infra delivered our flagship store on time and within budget. The quality of finish was exceptional — our store now consistently ranks among the top-performing outlets in the region.
description: A 4,200 sq ft premium fashion retail fit-out in Lower Parel, Mumbai. Designed to balance brand identity with high-traffic functionality — featuring custom display fixtures, premium POS islands, fitting rooms with smart lighting, and a feature wall installation.
